intro:
Nandyal is the headquarters of the newly formed Nandyal district in Andhra Pradesh, a growing city known for its cement industry and as a gateway to the Nallamala forest region. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 280+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Nandyal.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Nandyal's expanding city infrastructure and strong industrial base require vendors who are reliable and well-connected across Andhra Pradesh. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Nandyal. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Nandyal?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹3,500. 2 BHK typically ₹5,500 – ₹11,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Nandyal?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Nandyal and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
